data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of suggesting times based on integrated calendar availability. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no evidence that it has been implemented or validated, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system suggests times based on integrated calendar availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the time suggestion functionality.
